summary: CRITICAL: Workflow references non-existent files—fixtures/package.json, fixtures/requirements.txt, fixtures/license-config.json, fixtures/mock-licenses.json, and LicenseChecker.Tests.ps1. Workflow cannot execute or validate. Script lacks Set-StrictMode and parameter validation; JSON parsing has no error handling. Functions well-structured (Invoke-LicenseChecker, Read-DependencyManifest, Test-LicenseCompliance), but incomplete without fixtures and defensive I/O. Workflow trigger branches: ["**"] non-standard (glob matches all branches, use main/master). Missing fixture creation steps before script invocation. Incomplete deliverable.
